questionHtml: Write down an integral for the area of the shaded region in diagram 2.
markschemeHtml:
A= ∫-121.5x2-2.5x+3 dx            A1A1


Note: Award A1 for the limits x=-1, x=2 in correct location. Award A1 for an integral of the quadratic function, dx must be included. Do not accept “y” in place of the function, given that two equations are in the question.

 

[2 marks]
